sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101536" key="su/xnasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠ´χν-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is done frequently</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:183" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.183</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
